title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that jointly understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery. The video claims it outperforms AlphaFold 3 on drug design tasks and demonstrates applications in predicting drug toxicity, discovering cancer drugs, and generating antibodies.
